title: Floor tile
description: Tile depicting a scene from the tragic romance story of Tristam and Isolde. In the boat, Isolde is seen traveling to visit Tristam after he was banished to an island by Isolde's husband Mark. Unbeknownst to her, Tristram has died. This tile and others like it paved parts of the Chertsey Abbey.
rights: © The Trustees of the British Museum. Shared under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0) licence.
